name: Kabab Barg
instructions: Combine olive oil, lime juice, onions, garlic, saffron, salt, and pepper in a large, zip top food storage bag. Place lamb pieces in bag; seal and shake to combine. Marinate lamb, refrigerated, overnight or up to 24 hours.
Preheat an outdoor grill for medium-high heat, and lightly oil the grate.
Thread marinated lamb on long, thin metal skewers. Thread whole tomatoes on another skewer. Brush lamb and tomatoes with marinade; discard remaining marinade.
Grill kebabs, until lamb is cooked to your liking and tomatoes are hot and grill marked, about 5 minutes on each side. Sprinkle with sumac, if desired, before serving.

name: Kabob Marinade
instructions: Whisk oil, soy sauce, lemon juice, Worcestershire sauce, mustard, garlic, black pepper, and meat tenderizer together in a bowl until well combined.

name: Kabobs
instructions: Mix teriyaki sauce, honey, garlic powder, and ginger in a large resealable plastic bag. Place chicken, beef, red bell peppers, onion wedges, and mushrooms in the bag; coat with marinade, squeeze out excess air, and seal the bag. Refrigerate for 4 hours to overnight.
Preheat the grill to medium-high heat. Lightly oil the grill grate. Thread meat and vegetables onto skewers, leaving a small space between each item. Discard any remaining marinade.
Grill skewers, turning as needed, until meat is cooked through and vegetables are tender, about 10 minutes.

name: Kabocha Purée With Ginger

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Preheat oven to 375 °. Line a rimmed baking sheet with parchment or foil. Season inside of squash with salt and pepper. Place squash, cut side down, on prepared sheet. Roast until tender, 1–1 1/4 hours. Let cool slightly.

Line a strainer with a double layer of cheesecloth; set over a small bowl. Pulse ginger in a food processor until finely chopped. Transfer to prepared strainer. Gather edges of cheesecloth together; squeeze tightly to release ginger juice into bowl.

Scoop squash flesh into a food processor. Add sugar and 1 Tbsp. ginger juice. With machine running, gradually add 1 1/2 cups cream and purée until smooth, adding more cream by the spoonful if too thick. Season with salt, pepper, and more ginger juice, if desired. Gently warm in a saucepan, stirring constantly, until heated through. DO AHEAD: Can be made 1 day ahead. Gently rewarm purée in a saucepan, adding a little more cream if necessary.

name: Kabocha Squash And Pork Stir-fry

ingredients.prep: roasted peanuts and chopped cilantro (for serving)

instructions: Steam squash in a steamer basket set in a pot of simmering water until tender, 6–8 minutes. Let cool slightly. Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet and cook squash, turning occasionally, until browned, about 5 minutes. Transfer to a plate.

Heat remaining 1 Tbsp. oil in same skillet, add sausage, and cook, breaking into large pieces and stirring occasionally, until browned and cooked through, about 5 minutes. Add scallions, garlic, chile, and ginger and cook, stirring often, just until softened, about 2 minutes. Add squash, lime juice, fish sauce, and sugar; toss to combine.
Serve stir-fry topped with peanuts and cilantro.

name: Kabocha Squash And Scallion Tempura

ingredients.item: Honey and crushed red pepper flakes
Honey and crushed red pepper flakes

instructions: Pour vegetable oil into a large pot fitted with a deep-fry thermometer to come 2" up sides; heat over medium-high until thermometer registers 375°.
Meanwhile, whisk flour, baking powder, kosher salt, and ½ cup cornstarch in a medium bowl. Add club soda and whisk just to combine.

Working in batches, dust squash and scallions with some cornstarch, shaking off excess, then dip in batter, letting excess drip off. Fry, turning occasionally, until golden, about 4 minutes. Drain on paper towels. Serve drizzled with honey and sprinkled with red pepper flakes and sea salt.

name: Kabocha Squash And Shrimp Soup
instructions: Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat; cook and stir green onions until fragrant, about 1 minute. Add kabocha squash, shrimp, sugar, and salt; cook and stir until squash is lightly browned but still tender, 3 to 4 minutes. Remove skillet from heat.
Bring chicken broth to a boil in a pot; add squash and shrimp. Pour in enough water to cover squash by 1/2 inch. Simmer until squash is tender, 10 to 15 minutes.

name: Kabocha Squash Mini Muffins
instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil and grease lightly with cooking spray.
Place kabocha squash skin-side down on the baking sheet.
Roast in the preheated oven until fork-tender, 30 to 40 minutes. Cool until easily handled, about 10 minutes. Scoop squash flesh into a food processor; puree until smooth. Discard skin.
Reduce oven temperature to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease 2 mini muffin tins with cooking spray.
Stir white sugar, brown sugar, canola oil, and olive oil in a large bowl until smooth. Beat in eggs, 1 at a time. Stir in 3/4 cup pureed squash and vanilla extract.

Mix whole wheat flour, all-purpose flour, cinnamon, baking powder, baking soda, and salt together in a bowl. Stir gradually into sugar mixture, alternating with apple cider, until smooth. Pour into prepared muffin tins, filling each cup 3/4 full.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, about 10 minutes.

name: Kabocha Squash Pilaf With Coconut
instructions: Combine currants and vinegar in a small bowl; set aside.

Heat oil in a large skillet over medium; cook onion and ginger, stirring occasionally, until softened, 8–10 minutes. Stir in squash, rice, and 1¼ cups water; season with salt and pepper. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer until rice is tender, 15–18 minutes. Remove from heat, fluff rice with a fork, and let sit covered 10 minutes.
Drain currants and serve pilaf topped with drained currants and toasted unsweetened coconut flakes.

name: Kabocha Squash Risotto With Sage And Pine Nuts

ingredients.prep: peeled, seeded, cut into 1/2-inch cubes (about 6 generous cups)

ingredients.item: Crisply cooked coarsely crumbled thinly sliced pancetta

instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons olive oil in heavy large nonstick skillet over high heat. Add squash; sprinkle with sea salt and sauté until beginning to brown, stirring often, about 5 minutes. Reduce heat to medium, add chopped sage, and cook until just tender, stirring often, about 8 minutes.Sprinkle Sherry wine vinegar over; toss to incorporate. Transfer squash to plate. Wipe skillet clean.

Heat remaining 2 tablespoons olive oil in same skillet over high heat. Add chopped onions, sprinkle with sea salt, and sauté until onions are soft and beginning to brown, about 6 minutes. Reduce heat to low, cover, and cook until onions are soft and deep golden brown, stirring occasionally, about 20 minutes; set aside. Bring 3 1/2 cups water and vegetable broth to simmer in large saucepan. Cover and keep warm over low heat.

Add arborio rice to onions in skillet. Stir until rice is slightly translucent, about 4 minutes. Add Sherry; stir until absorbed. Add 1 cup warm broth mixture; stir until almost all liquid is absorbed, about 3 minutes. Continue adding broth mixture by cupfuls until rice is just tender but still firm to bite and risotto is creamy, stirring almost constantly and adding squash after 15 minutes, about 20 minutes total. Season with salt and pepper. Stir in 6 tablespoons toasted pine nuts. Transfer squash risotto to large wide serving bowl. Sprinkle remaining toasted pine nuts over risotto.
Top risotto with shaved Parmesan and crumbled pancetta, if desired.

name: Kabune

ingredients.item: 1 kase yağsız dana eti (haşlanmış ve didiklenmiş)

instructions: 1. Soğanı ince ince yarım halka şeklinde doğradıktan sonra tuz ve karabiberle ovun.
2.  Tabanı yapışmayan bir pilav tenceresine eşit şekilde yayın.
3.  Üzerine eti ve onun üzerine de haşlanmış nohutu yerleştirin.
4.  En üste de yıkayıp süzdüğünüz pirinci koyun.
5.  Çok az tuz ilave edin ve 3 yemek kaşığı zeytinyağını pirincin üzerinde gezdirin.
6.  4 bardak suyu kaynatın ve et bulyonu içinde erittikten sonra pirincin üzerine ekleyin ve suyunu çekene kadar pişirin.
7. Tereyağını küçük bir tavaya alarak güzelce kızarttıktan sonra pilavın üzerinde gezdirin ve pilavı dinlenmeye bırakın.
8.  Sıcak servis edin.
9. Lezzetine doyamayacağınız maklube tarifini de notlarınıza ekleyin.

name: Kabune Pilaf Recipe

ingredients.item: 2 su bardağı baldo pirinç, yıkanmış ve süzülmüş
200 gram kuşbaşı kuzu eti veya tavuk
2 yemek kaşığı tereyağı veya sıvı yağ
3 su bardağı sıcak su veya et suyu
1/4 su bardağı kavrulmuş badem veya dolmalık fıstık (isteğe bağlı)
Kuşbaşı kuzu eti yerine tavuk, hindi veya dana eti kullanabilirsiniz.
Daha hafif bir versiyon için tavuk göğsü veya hindi tercih edilebilir.
Soğan dışında havuç, kabak, bezelye veya kırmızı biber ekleyerek pilavı daha renkli ve besleyici hale getirebilirsiniz.
Sebzeleri pirinçle birlikte değil, ayrı soteleyip son aşamada karıştırmak renk ve dokuyu korur.
Kavrulmuş dolmalık fıstık, badem veya kaju ekleyerek pilava ekstra kıtır ve aroma katabilirsiniz.
Kuruyemişleri pilav piştikten sonra eklemek en iyi sonucu verir.
Nohut kullanmak istemeyenler için sadece et ve pirinçle hazırlayabilirsiniz.
Daha hafif bir pilav isteyenler için yağ miktarını azaltabilirsiniz.
Beyaz pirinç yerine esmer pirinç, bulgur veya kinoa kullanabilirsiniz.
Lif oranı yüksek ve daha tok tutan bir pilav elde edersiniz.
Tarçın ve yenibahar dışında karanfil, kakule veya muskat gibi baharatlar ekleyerek pilavın aromatik yoğunluğunu artırabilirsiniz.
Baharatları kontrollü eklemek, kabune pilavı’nın karakteristik tadını korur.
Pilav piştikten sonra üzerine birkaç damla taze limon veya portakal suyu ekleyebilirsiniz.
Hafif ekşi aromalı bu versiyon, kabune pilavı’na ferah bir tat katar.

instructions: 1. Orta boy bir tencerede yağı ısıtın, kuşbaşı eti ekleyip rengi dönene kadar kavurun.
2. Soğanları ekleyip yumuşayıncaya kadar kavurun.
3. Yıkanmış pirinci ekleyin, 1–2 dakika boyunca kavurun, pirinç yağı iyice çeksin.
4. Tuz, karabiber, isteğe bağlı tarçın veya yenibahar ekleyin, sıcak su veya et suyunu ilave edin.
5. Haşlanmış nohut ve kavrulmuş badem/fıstıkları ekleyin.
6. Tencerenin kapağını kapatın, kısık ateşte pirinçler suyunu çekene kadar yaklaşık 15–20 dakika pişirin.
7. Ocaktan aldıktan sonra 5 dakika dinlendirin, hafifçe karıştırın ve servis edin.
8.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Kachumbari

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Place the onion in a medium bowl, cover with water, and stir in sea salt. Soak for 30 minutes; drain well for 10 minutes.
Stir the drained onion, tomatoes, cucumber, cilantro, jalapeno, and avocado together in a large bowl. Squeeze lime juice over the salad to taste and season with salt and pepper.

name: Kadaifi Nests With Cheeses And Sweet Quince
original_name: Φωλιές κανταΐφι με τυριά και γλυκό κυδώνι
instructions: Ανοίγουμε το φύλλο διαχωρίζοντας τις ίνες του, το περιχύνουμε με το λιωμένο βούτυρο και το αφρατεύουμε με τα χέρια να βουτυρωθεί καλά.
Το χωρίζουμε σε 12 μέρη και το μοιράζουμε σε ισάριθμες ατομικές φόρμες για cupcakes, δίνοντας σχήμα φωλιάς.
Ψήνουμε σε καλά προθερμασμένο φούρνο, στους 200°C, στον αέρα, στη μεσαία σχάρα, για 10 λεπτά, να ροδίσουν.
Ρίχνουμε τη γραβιέρα, το τυρί κρέμα, το προσούτο, το αβγό και φρεσκοτριμμένο πιπέρι σε ένα μπολ και ανακατεύουμε καλά με σύρμα να ομογενοποιηθούν.
Ισομοιράζουμε με ένα κουτάλι το μείγμα στις ψημένες φωλιές και τις επαναφέρουμε στο φούρνο για 10 λεπτά ακόμα, μέχρι να σταθεροποιηθεί η γέμιση και να αποκτήσει μια ελαφριά κρούστα.
Σερβίρουμε τις φωλιές γαρνίροντας με λίγο γλυκό κυδώνι και ψιλοκομμένο σχοινόπρασο.

name: Kadaifi Souffle With Cheeses
instructions: Ζεσταίνουμε το λάδι σε τηγάνι και σοτάρουμε τις πιπεριές για 4′-5′ ανακατεύοντας.
Αφήνουμε λίγο να κρυώσουν.
Τρίβουμε όλα τα τυριά σε χοντρό τρίφτη μέσα σε μεγάλο μπολ.
Προσθέτουμε τα αυγά χτυπημένα, το ελαιόλαδο, το πιπέρι και τις χλιαρές πλέον πιπεριές.
Τα ανακατεύουμε με κουτάλι πολύ καλά.
Χωρίζουμε το φύλλο κανταΐφι σε δύο ίσα μέρη.
Το ανοίγουμε και το αφρατεύουμε με τα δάχτυλα.
Πρώτα βουτυρώνουμε ένα μεγάλο μακρόστενο πυράντοχο σκεύος.
Στρώνουμε το μισό στο πυράντοχο σκεύος και αδειάζουμε τη γέμιση.
Από πάνω σκεπάζουμε με το υπόλοιπο κανταΐφι, αφού το ανοίξουμε με τα δάχτυλα, ώστε να αφρατέψει.
Κόβουμε με μαχαίρι σε κομμάτια.
Χτυπάμε σε μπολ τα 6 αυγά με το γάλα, την πάπρικα και το μοσχοκάρυδο.
Περιχύνουμε το κανταΐφι.
Αφήνουμε να σταθεί για μία ώρα σε θερμοκρασία δωματίου, ώστε να ρουφήξει τα υγρά και να φουσκώσει το κανταΐφι.
Περιχύνουμε έπειτα με το λιωμένο βούτυρο.
Σε καλά προθερμασμένο φούρνο ψήνουμε στους 180ºC το σουφλέ για 50′ περίπου, ώσπου να ροδίσει καλά και να φουσκώσει.

name: Kadaifi With Cream
instructions: Πρώτα φτιάχνουμε την κρέμα για τη γέμιση ώστε να κρυώσει τελείως για να γεμίσουμε τα κανταΐφια.
Βάζουμε σε κατσαρόλα με χοντρή βάση το γάλα µε την κρέµα γάλακτος.
Χαράζουμε το µπαστουνάκι βανίλιας και το προσθέτουμε στο γάλα (για περισσότερο άρωμα, θα το αφαιρέσουμε μόλις βράσει η κρέμα).
Σε μπολ χτυπάμε µε σύρμα το αυγό, τους κρόκους, τη ζάχαρη και το αλάτι.
Σιγά σιγά κοσκινίζουμε το αλεύρι και το κορν φλάουρ στα αυγά.
Αναμειγνύουμε πολύ καλά τα υλικά µε το σύρμα.
Λίγο πριν βράσουν γάλα και κρέμα, τα ρίχνουμε σιγά σιγά στο μίγμα των αυγών, ανακατεύοντας πάντα με σύρμα.
Ξαναβάζουμε την κρέμα στην κατσαρόλα και ανακατεύουμε συνεχώς σε μέτρια φωτιά για 5 με 6 λεπτά, μέχρι να δέσει και να πήξει.
Αποσύρουμε από τη φωτιά.
Προσθέτουμε το βούτυρο κι ανακατεύουμε να λιώσει.
Τη μεταφέρουμε σε ανοιχτό μπολ και την καλύπτουμε ακουμπώντας επάνω στην επιφάνειά της, μεμβράνη που εφάπτεται.
Αφού έρθει σε θερμοκρασία δωματίου, τη φυλάμε στο ψυγείο μέχρι να τη χρησιμοποιήσουμε.
Αρφανεύουμε την κρύα κρέμα με μίξερ χειρός πριν γεμίσουμε τα κανταΐφια.

name: Kadayif Magnolia Recipe

ingredients.item: Fındık, ceviz veya antep fıstığı (isteğe bağlı)
Tel kadayıf yerine hazır fırınlanmış kadayıf veya ince kırılmış yulaf gevreği kullanılabilir.
Tereyağı yerine zeytinyağı veya hindistancevizi yağı kullanabilirsiniz.
Toz şeker yerine pudra şekeri veya bal ile tatlandırabilirsiniz.
Fındık, ceviz veya antep fıstığı yerine badem, kaju veya çikolata parçacıkları tercih edilebilir.
Meyve ile süsleme yapmak istersen çilek, kivi veya muz dilimleri ekleyebilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Kadayıfı küçük parçalar halinde kırın, eritilmiş tereyağı ve şekerle karıştırın.
2. Yağlı kağıt serili fırın tepsisine yayın ve 180°C’de 10-12 dakika kızarana kadar pişirin.
3. Krema için süt, şeker ve nişastayı bir tencerede karıştırın, orta ateşte koyulaşana kadar sürekli karıştırarak pişirin.
4. Koyulaşan kremaya tereyağı ve vanilini ekleyip karıştırın.
5. İsteğe bağlı olarak krem şanti ekleyerek kremayı daha hafif ve kabarık yapabilirsiniz.
6. Servis kaselerine önce kızarmış kadayıfın yarısını yayın, üzerine krema ekleyin ve kalan kadayıf ile kaplayın.
7. Üzerini fındık, ceviz veya antep fıstığı ile süsleyin.
8. Servis öncesi buzdolabında 1-2 saat dinlendirin ve servis edin.
9.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Kadayif With Milk
instructions: 1. hazırlaması kolay lezzetli bir bayram tatlısı.
2.  Süt ve şekeri tencereye alıp orta ateşte kaynatın ve soğumaya bırakın.
3.  Eritilmiş tereyağının 2/3’ünü kadayıfın üzerine döküp elinizde didikleyerek karıştırın.
4.  Yağlanmış fırın kabına bastırarak yayın.
5.  Üzerine ceviz içini yayıp kalan kadayıfı üzerine kapatıp bastırın.
6.  Kalan yağı gezdirip 190 dereceye ayarlanmış fırında kızarıncaya kadar pişirin.
7.  Fırından çıkartıp soğumuş şerbeti üzerine gezdirin.
8.  Üzerine iri çekilmiş ceviz içi serpiştirip servis yapın.

name: Kadayifli Pudding Cups Recipe

ingredients.item: Yarım su bardağı iri çekilmiş ceviz (isteğe bağlı)
Ceviz yerine antep fıstığı, fındık veya badem kullanabilirsiniz.
Tereyağı yerine aynı miktarda margarin tercih edilebilir.
Daha hafif bir versiyon için kremayı yarım paket kullanabilirsiniz.
Muhallebiye 1 yemek kaşığı hindistan cevizi ekleyerek farklı bir aroma elde edebilirsiniz.
Şeker miktarını azaltarak daha az tatlı bir tatlı hazırlayabilirsiniz.
Kadayıfa 1–2 yemek kaşığı bal ekleyerek daha yoğun bir lezzet oluşturabilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Öncelikle kadayıfları elinizle ufalayarak küçük parçalara ayırın.
2.  Tavada tereyağını eritin ve kadayıfları ekleyerek orta ateşte sürekli karıştırarak kavurmaya başlayın.
3. Rengi hafif dönmeye başladığında şekeri ilave edin ve karıştırmaya devam edin.
4.  Kadayıflar altın kahverengi, çıtır bir kıvam aldığında ocaktan almaya yakın cevizleri ekleyip son kez karıştırın.
5.  Hazırladığınız kadayıfı soğuması için kenara alın.
6. Muhallebi için süt, şeker, un ve nişastayı tencereye alıp çırparak karıştırın.
7.  Orta ateşte sürekli karıştırarak koyulaşana kadar pişirin.
8.  Kaynamaya başladıktan sonra birkaç dakika daha karıştırarak kıvamını oturtun.
9.  Ocaktan aldıktan sonra tereyağı ve vanilini ekleyin, pürüzsüz bir doku elde etmek için mikserle birkaç dakika çırpın.
10. Muhallebi ılıdığında kremayı ilave edip tekrar çırparak daha yumuşak ve akışkan bir kıvam elde edin.
11. Servis kuplarının tabanına birkaç kaşık kadayıf yerleştirin, üzerine sıcak muhallebiden dökün.
12. En üste kadayıf serpiştirerek tatlıyı tamamlayın.
13.  Kupları buzdolabında en az iki saat dinlendirip soğuk olarak servis edin.
14.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Kadayıf Dessert With Pistachio
instructions: 1. Tereyağını eritin ve kadayıfın üzerine gezdirip iyice karıştırın.
2.  25 cm çapında yuvarlak bir tepsiyi yağlayın.
3.  Kadayıfı tepsiye aktarın ve elinizle iyice bastırarak düzleştirin.
4.  Antep fıstıklarını kadayıfın üzerinde boşluk kalmayacak şekilde yayın.
5.  Önceden ısıtılmış 180 derece fırında 35-40 dakika pişirin.
6.  Şurup için toz şeker ve suyu kaynatın.
7.  Ocaktan alıp soğumaya bırakın.
8.  Soğuyan şerbeti fırından çıkardığınız sıcak tatlının üzerine dökün.
9.  30 dakika kadar şerbeti çekmesini bekleyip dilimleyin.
10.  Ilık servis yapın.
11.  Antep usulü fıstıklı kadayıf tarifine buradan ulaşabilirsiniz.

name: Kadayıf Dessert With Walnuts
instructions: 1. Kadayıfı ufak parçalar halinde koparın ve küçük muffin kaplarının tabanına paylaştırın.
2.  Üzerine bastırarak kadayıfın kalıpların içine iyice yerleşmesini sağlayın.
3.  Kuruması için 1 gece oda ısısında bekletin.
4.  Tereyağını kısık ateşte eritip süzgeçten geçirin.
5. Kuruyan kadayıfların üzerine kaşıkla eritilmiş tereyağı dökün ve önceden ısıtılmış 180 derece fırında kadayıflar kızarıncaya kadar yaklaşık 15 dakika pişirin.
6.  Fırından çıkarıp 5 dakika bekletin.
7.  Kadayıf çanaklarını ılınınca kalıplardan çıkarıp servis tabağına yerleştirin.
8. Şerbeti için toz şeker ve suyu tencereye alıp orta ateşte kaynatın.
9.  Limon suyunu ekleyip 10 dakika daha kaynatın.
10.  Portakal suyu ile tatlandırıp iç cevizleri ilave edin ve birkaç dakika daha pişirin.
11.  Şerbetli cevizli karışımı kaşık yardımı ile kadayıfların içine doldurun ve soğuduktan sonra servis yapın.

name: Kadayıf With Pistachio
instructions: 1. Lezzet'in yemek tarifleri gibi tatlı tarifleri de çok ilgi görüyor.
2.  Su ve şekeri tencereye alıp koyulaşıncaya kadar pişirin.
3.  Limon suyunu ekleyip ocaktan alın ve soğumaya bırakın.
4.  Tereyağını eritin.
5.  Kadayıfı geniş bir tepsiye alıp elinizle didikleyerek tel tel ayırın.
6.  Üzerine tereyağını gezdirerek dökün.
7.  Kadayıfın yağı iyice çekmesi için elinizle iyice ovun.
8.  Kadayıfı ikiye ayırın.
9.  35 santimlik alüminyum tepsiyi yağlayın.
10.  Kadayıfın yarısını tepsinin alt kısmına elinizle bastırıp sıkıştırarak yayın.
11.  Üzerine cevizi serpiştirin.
12.  Kalan kadayıfı cevizlerin üzerine yayıp elinizle iyice bastırarak yayın.
13.  180 dereceye ayarlı fırında üzeri nar gibi kızarıncaya kadar pişirin.
14.  Soğuk şerbeti sıcak tatlının üzerine dökün.
15.  Tepsinin üzerini örtüp 1 saat bekletin.
16.  Fıstık ve kaymakla süsleyip servis yapın.
17.  Afiyet olsun.
18. Farklı bir tat için, fıstıklı kadayıf tarifini de deneyebilirsiniz.

name: Kadhi

ingredients.item: . plus 4 0.5 tsp. ghee or extra-virgin olive oil

instructions: Mix yogurt and chickpea flour in a large measuring glass until smooth and homogeneous. Stir in 1 cup water, followed by turmeric—the mixture should be a pale yellow color; set aside.

Melt 1 Tbsp. ghee in a medium Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium heat. Add cloves, bay leaves, peppercorns, mustard seeds, fenugreek seeds, and ½ tsp. cumin seeds and cook, stirring, until mustard seeds start to pop, about 1 minute. Reduce heat to low and add reserved yogurt mixture and 3 cups water; mix well. Season with 2 tsp. salt. Taste—the mixture should be tangy, rich, and distinctly flavored by the spices. Add lime juice to taste and more salt if needed.

Increase heat to high and bring to a boil, stirring constantly (if you stop stirring, it will curdle). Insert a large long-handled spoon into the pot to prevent soup from boiling over and let cook 10 minutes without stirring (if at any point it looks like it might boil over, reduce heat to medium-high for a minute before turning it back up). The kadhi should become thicker and brighter in color and look like a creamy soup. Taste again and add more lime juice if needed.

About 5 minutes before kadhi is done cooking, melt remaining 4½ tsp. ghee in a small saucepan or butter warmer over medium-high. Cook remaining 1 tsp. cumin seeds until they start to sputter and turn brown, a matter of seconds. Immediately remove pan from heat and stir in chiles, asafetida (if using), and chili powder.
Stir spiced ghee into kadhi and serve in bowls over rice.

name: Kadinbudu Meatballs With Pea Puree
instructions: 1. Pirinci suda yumuşayıncaya kadar haşlayın.
2.  Haşlandıktan sonra suyunu süzüp kenara alın.
3.  Orta ateşteki bir tavaya zeytinyağını ekleyin.
4.  Soğanları ve kıymanın yarısını birlikte soteleyin.
5.  Ocaktan alıp soğumasını bekleyin.
6.  Sotelenmiş kıymayı ve kalan kıymayı ayrı bir kaba alın.
7.  İçine pirinci, 1 yumurtayı, maydanozu, kekiği, kimyonu, tuzu ve karabiberi ekleyin.
8.  Yoğurduktan sonra istediğiniz şekil ve boyda köfteler hazırlayın.
9.  Ufak bir kasede kalan iki yumurtayı çatalla hafifçe çırpın.
10.  Bir başka kaseye de unu alın.
11.  Ayçiçek yağını tavada kızdırın.
12.  Köfteleri önce una sonra yumurtaya bulayıp fazlasını silkeleyin ve kızgın yağda kızartın.
13.  Kızaran köfteleri fazla yağını çekmesi için kağıt havlu üzerine alın.
14.  Bezelye püresi için bezelyeleri haşlayın.
15.  Tavada zeytinyağını ısıtıp soğanları ekleyin ve yumuşayıncaya kadar soteleyin.
16.  Bezelyeleri de ekleyip 2 dakika daha orta ateşte çevirin.
17.  Kremayı ekleyin ve koyulaşıncaya kadar orta ateşte birkaç dakika daha pişirin.
18.  Tavadaki miktarın üçte birini mutfak robotuna aktarın.
19.  Tuzunu ayarlayın ve birkaç kere çevirerek püre kıvamına getirin.
20.  İnce bir süzgeç ya da elekten geçirip pürüzsüz olmasını sağlayın.
21.  Kalan bezelyeleri pişirip hafifçe ezerek püreye ekleyin.
22.  Naneyle tatlandırın.
23.  Kadınbudu köftelerini yanında bezelye püresiyle birlikte servis yapın.
24.  Afiyet olsun.
25. Türk mutfağında ve Balkan ülkelerinde sık sık tüketilen klasik kadınbudu köfte tarifini de deneyebilirsiniz.

name: Kaese Spaetzle

ingredients.item: 1,5 su bardağı kars kaşarı rendesi (emmantel peyniri)

instructions: 1. Un, muskat, tuz ve karabiberi harmanlayın.
2.  Yumurtaları orta bir kapta çırpın.
3.  Ayrı bir kapta da süt ve unu karıştırın.
4. Elde ettiğiniz bu karışımları bir kapta birleştirerek pürüzsüz bir kıvam elde edin.
5.  Elde ettiğiniz hamuru yaklaşık 20 dakika dinlendirin.
6.   Tencerede tuzlu su kaynatın.
7.  Hamuru rendeleyerek ya da kevgirden geçirerek suyun içine bırakın.
8.  Pişenler suyun üzerinde yüzecektir.
9.  Pişenleri ayrı bir kaba alın.
10.  1 su bardağı peynir ile karıştırın.
11.  Tavada tereyağını eritin, soğanları renk alana kadar pişirin.
12.  Pişen hamurları yani ‘spaetzle’’leri ekleyerek karıştırın.
13.  Üzerine kalan peyniri dökerek servis edin.
14.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Kagianas (greek Eggs And Tomato)

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Place tomatoes into a food processor; blend until smooth.
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Stir in tomatoes, salt, and pepper; cook and stir until all liquid has evaporated from the tomatoes, 10 to 15 minutes.
Reduce heat to medium. Add eggs; cook, stirring constantly, until mixture is evenly dry and no large chunks remain, 7 to 10 minutes.

name: Kahlua-walnut Brownie Bites

ingredients.item: Muscovado sugar or light brown sugar

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Coat the bottom and sides of an 8x8" glass baking dish with nonstick spray. (If using a metal baking pan, heat oven to 325°.)
Sift flour, cocoa powder, and salt into a small bowl; set aside.

Place butter and espresso powder in a bowl set over a medium saucepan of simmering water. Stir until butter is melted. Add 5 oz. chocolate and stir until mixture is smooth. Remove from heat and stir in sugars. Add eggs, Kahlúa, and vanilla extract and mix until well combined. Add the flour mixture and stir until blended.

Pour batter into prepared pan and sprinkle remaining 1/3 cup chocolate chips and chopped walnuts over. Bake until a tester inserted in center of pan comes out clean, 30–35 minutes. Let cool completely; cut brownies into 2" squares.

name: Kahlúa-spiked Frozen Mocha Lattes

ingredients.prep: enough to make about forty-five 1 3/4x1 3/4x1 1/4-inch ice cubes
try an organic, all-natural aerosol whipped cream, like Clover Farms.

instructions: Whisk first 3 ingredients and pinch of salt in medium saucepan. Gradually whisk in 1 cup water, whisking until smooth. Cook over medium-high heat until sugar dissolves and mixture just begins to boil, whisking often, about 3 minutes. Remove pan from heat. Add 1 1/2 cups water and half and half; whisk to blend. Transfer to pitcher. Pour espresso mixture into ice cube trays, filling cubes almost to top (mixture will make about 45 ice cubes). Freeze espresso mixture in trays. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 month ahead. Store espresso ice cubes in resealable plastic bag and keep frozen.
Using electric mixer, beat cream, brown sugar, vanilla, and pinch of salt in medium bowl until peaks form. Cover; chill.

Place 6 glass coffee mugs or other glasses in freezer 15 minutes. Working in 3 batches, place 14 espresso ice cubes and 1/4 cup Kahlúa in processor. Blend until thick and smooth, about 30 seconds. Divide between 2 chilled mugs; place in freezer. Repeat 2 more times with espresso ice cubes, Kahlúa, and chilled mugs. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 hour ahead. Keep frozen.
Spoon sweetened whipped cream atop frozen mocha lattes and serve.

name: Kaimuki Daiquiri
instructions: Combine sugar and 1/3 cup water in a jar. Cover; shake until sugar dissolves. Combine syrup, rum, lime juice, and bitters in a large pitcher. Add 8 cups ice; stir until ice begins to melt, about 1 minute. Serve over ice, garnished with basil flowers, if desired.
DO AHEAD: Syrup can be made 3 months ahead; cover and chill.

name: Kaju Katli
instructions: Place 2 large pieces of parchment (at least 12" long) on a work surface. Pulse cashews in a food processor or coffee grinder to a fine powder. Set a mesh sieve over a medium bowl and sift cashew powder into bowl. Return any larger pieces still in sieve to processor and pulse again to break up further (but be careful not to turn into nut butter). Sift into bowl; set cashew powder aside.

Heat sugar and ¼ cup water in a medium saucepan over medium, stirring constantly, until sugar is dissolved; stir in cardamom. Clip thermometer to side of pan and bring mixture to a boil (still over medium). Cook, stirring often, until thermometer registers 230°–235° (mixture should be syrupy but not thick), about 3 minutes.

Reduce heat to low. Stir in ghee and reserved cashew powder. Cook, stirring constantly, until dough begins to pull away from sides of pan and form a mass in the center, about 3 minutes. Be careful, as the sugar will make the dough very, very hot. (You can check if the dough is ready by carefully scooping out a small spoonful and letting it cool until safe to touch. If you can roll it into a ball and it holds its shape, it’s ready.)

Transfer dough to 1 sheet of parchment. Let cool until safe to handle (dough will stay hot in the center, so be very careful). Knead warm dough 1 minute, then top with the remaining sheet of parchment. Roll out to create an oval about ½" thick. Peel away top layer of parchment and carefully apply silver leaf (if using) to surface. Using a paring knife and a ruler, cut dough into 1"-wide strips. Then make diagonal cuts at 1" intervals across the strips to create diamond shapes. Separate out individual kaju katli. (Save scraps for snacking on later.)
Do ahead: Kaju katli can be made 1 month ahead. Transfer to an airtight container; cover and chill, or freeze up to 3 months.

name: Kala Chola Pakistani-style
instructions: Place garbanzo beans into a large bowl. Pour enough water over beans to cover by several inches. Soak for 8 hours to overnight. Rinse and drain garbanzo beans thoroughly.

Combine garbanzo beans, 3 cups water, tomatoes, 1 finely chopped onion, dried red chile peppers, jalapeño pepper, oil, salt, turmeric, and ground red chile pepper in a large pot over medium-high heat; bring to a boil, reduce heat to medium-low, and cook until garbanzo beans are tender, 3 to 4 hours. Add water as needed to keep about 1 inch of liquid at the bottom of the pot.
Garnish with cilantro and 1 tablespoon finely chopped onion to serve.

name: Kalbi
instructions: Place short ribs in a resealable plastic bag; pour Korean BBQ Marinade over. Seal bag; turn to coat and chill 3 hours. Let come to room temperature before grilling. Drain and pat dry with paper towels.
Build a medium fire in a charcoal grill, or heat a gas grill to medium-high. Grill 2-3 minutes per side, or until just cooked through.
Transfer to a platter and let rest 5-10 minutes. Garnish with scallions.

name: Kalbi (korean Bbq Short Ribs)
instructions: Stir soy sauce, brown sugar, water, green onions, garlic, and sesame oil together in a bowl until sugar has dissolved.
Place ribs in a large resealable plastic bag; pour in marinade, squeeze out excess air, and seal the bag. Marinate in the refrigerator for 3 hours.

Preheat an outdoor grill for medium-high heat; lightly oil the grate. Remove ribs from the bag; shake off excess marinade and discard marinade. Grill ribs on the preheated grill until meat is still pink but not bloody nearest the bone, 5 to 7 minutes per side.

name: Kalbi (korean Marinated Short Ribs)
instructions: Place ribs in a bowl and cover with water; soak until water turns pink, about 1 hour. Drain and rinse in cold water.
Combine soy sauce, Asian pear, onion, garlic, and ginger in a food processor. Pulse until smooth.

Combine green onions, sesame oil, brown sugar, sesame seeds, honey, and black pepper in a large bowl; mix well. Add ribs and coat thoroughly with the marinade. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate 8 hours to overnight.
Preheat an outdoor grill for high heat and lightly oil the grate.
Cook ribs on the grill until slightly charred and tender, about 4 minutes per side.

name: Kalbi Marinade
instructions: Combine green onions, brown sugar, soy sauce, sherry, ginger, garlic, sesame oil, sesame seeds, black bean sauce, black pepper, and garlic chile paste in a large bowl. Whisk until brown sugar is completely dissolved, 2 to 3 minutes.

name: Kalbi Ribs
instructions: Whisk water, sugar, soy sauce, sesame oil, garlic, and ginger together in a large glass or ceramic bowl. Add beef short ribs and toss to evenly coat. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap; marinate in the refrigerator, 8 hours to overnight.
Preheat an outdoor grill for medium-high heat and lightly oil the grate. Remove short ribs from marinade, allowing excess to drip off; discard remaining marinade.
Cook on the preheated grill until evenly browned, 3 to 4 minutes per side. An instant-read thermometer inserted into centers should read 63°C (63 degrees C).

name: Kalbi-style Steak And Mushroom Lettuce Wraps

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or 1 0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: aleppo-style pepper, or chipotle chile flakes
peeled, grated, or 1 cup unsweetened applesauce
finely chopped, plus more thinly sliced for serving
thinly sliced, plus more for serving

instructions: Toss 1 large bunch radishes, trimmed, cut into matchsticks, with 2 tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a medium bowl. Let sit until radishes begin to release liquid, about 5 minutes. Using your hands, squeeze out excess liquid; pour off. Toss radishes with 1 garlic clove, finely chopped, 1 Tbsp. apple cider vinegar, 1 Tbsp. gochugaru, Aleppo-style pepper, or chipotle chile flakes, and 1½ tsp. dark brown sugar. Add 2 scallions, thinly sliced; toss to combine. Chill salad until ready to serve.

Mix 1 medium Asian pear, peeled, grated, or 1 cup unsweetened applesauce, 4 garlic cloves, finely chopped, one 1" piece ginger, peeled, finely grated, ½ cup soy sauce, ¼ cup dark brown sugar, 1 Tbsp. toasted sesame oil, and 1 scallion, thinly sliced, in a large bowl until brown sugar is dissolved. Season marinade with freshly ground black pepper. Add 1 lb. flank or skirt steak and 8 oz. king trumpet mushrooms, sliced lengthwise ½" thick, to marinade and toss to coat. Cover and chill at least 30 minutes and up to 3 hours.

Prepare a grill for medium-high heat; oil grate. Remove steak and mushrooms from marinade, letting excess drip back into bowl; discard marinade. Grill steak, turning once, until lightly charred on the outside and medium-rare (an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of steak should register 125°), about 3 minutes per side. Grill mushrooms, turning once, until tender and lightly charred, about 3 minutes per side. Transfer steak to a cutting board and let rest 5–10 minutes. Transfer mushrooms to a platter.
Slice steak against the grain ¼" thick; transfer to platter. Serve steak and mushrooms with romaine lettuce leaves, sliced garlic, more scallions, and radish salad for making lettuce wraps.

name: Kalburabastı With Yogurt Recipe

ingredients.item: Tam buğday unu (daha besleyici ve lifli)
Mısır unu (farklı doku için, karışımda kullanılabilir)
İnce bulgur (daha farklı bir doku için)
Nar ekşisi (farklı bir ekşilik katmak için)

instructions: 1. Su ve şekeri bir tencereye alın, kaynamaya başlayınca limon suyunu ekleyin ve 15 dakika kısık ateşte kaynatın.
2.  Soğumaya bırakın.
3. Un, irmik, yoğurt, sıvı yağ, toz şeker, kabartma tozu ve vanilini derin bir kapta iyice karıştırarak yumuşak ve ele yapışmayan bir hamur elde edin.
4. Ceviz içi, toz şeker ve tarçını karıştırın.
5. Hamurdan ceviz büyüklüğünde parçalar koparın.
6.  Hamuru unlanmış kalbur veya kalbur yüzeyi üzerine hafifçe bastırarak açın.
7. Açtığınız hamurun ortasına cevizli harçtan koyun ve hamuru dikkatlice sararak kalburdan çıkarın.
8. Hazırladığınız tatlıları yağlı kağıt serili fırın tepsisine dizin.
9. Önceden ısıtılmış 170 derece fırında yaklaşık 25-30 dakika, hafif pembeleşene kadar pişirin.
10. Fırından çıkar çıkmaz soğuk şerbeti sıcak tatlının üzerine gezdirin.
11.  Tatlının şerbeti çekmesi için oda sıcaklığında bekletin ve servis edebilirsiniz.

name: Kale And Bean Bruschetta

ingredients.item: Cannellini beans with kale (click for recipe)

instructions: Rub cut side of garlic on toasts.
Top with bean mixture and cheese shavings.

name: Kale And Brussels Slaw With Quinoa
instructions: In a food processor, combine the shallots, vinegar, lemon juice, maple syrup, olive oil, salt and pepper and blend until smooth. Set aside.
Line a small baking sheet with Reynolds Wrap® Aluminum Foil. Set aside.

In a non-stick pan over medium heat, combine the hazelnuts, sugar and cayenne. Stir with a silicone spatula until the sugar has melted and sticks to the nuts, about 5 minutes; turn down the heat to prevent burning if needed. Spread the sticky nuts out on the foil-lined sheet to cool. When the nuts are cool enough to handle, break them up by hand.

Stem the kale and chop well. Using a mandoline, shred the Brussels sprouts, discarding the tough ends. Combine both in a large salad bowl. Add the hazelnuts, quinoa, pomegranate seeds, green onions and cheese. Dress to your liking and serve immediately.

name: Kale And Brussels Sprout Salad

ingredients.item: Bunches of tuscan kale (about 1 0.5 lb. total)
ingredients.prep: center stem discarded, leaves thinly sliced

instructions: Combine lemon juice, Dijon mustard, shallot, garlic, ½ tsp. salt, and a pinch of pepper in a small bowl. Stir to blend; set aside to let flavors meld. Mix thinly sliced kale and shredded brussels sprouts in a large bowl.

Measure ½ cup oil into a cup. Spoon 1 Tbsp. oil from cup into a small skillet; heat oil over medium-high heat. Add almonds to skillet and stir frequently until golden brown in spots, about 2 minutes. Transfer nuts to a paper towel-lined plate. Sprinkle almonds lightly with salt.
Slowly whisk remaining olive oil in cup into lemon-juice mixture. Season dressing to taste with salt and pepper.
Add dressing and cheese to kale mixture; toss to coat. Season lightly with salt and pepper. Garnish with almonds.
Do Ahead: Dressing, kale mixture, and toasted almonds can be prepared 8 hours ahead. Cover dressing and kale mixture separately and chill. Cover almonds and let stand at room temperature.

name: Kale And Cannellini Soup

ingredients.item: Cooking liquid from cannellini beans with kale

instructions: Heat oil in large pot over medium heat. Add carrot and celery; sauté until starting to soften, about 5 minutes. Add cooking liquid, beans, tomatoes with juice, 3 tablespoons cheese, garlic, and Italian seasoning. Simmer, uncovered, 30 minutes. Puree 2 cups soup in blender. Return puree to pot.
Ladle soup into bowls; top with toasts. Drizzle truffle oil over; sprinkle with cheese.

name: Kale And Celery Tiger Salad

ingredients.item: Palm sugar or light brown sugar

ingredients.prep: ribs and stems removed, leaves thinly sliced

ingredients.item: Fresh cilantro leaves with tender stems
Fresh thai or sweet basil leaves

ingredients.prep: roasted sunflower seeds and/or pumpkin seeds
an Indian snack of crispy chickpea noodles, can be found at Indian markets and online.

instructions: Whisk chiles, garlic, lime juice, fish sauce, palm sugar, and 2 Tbsp. water in a large bowl. Let sit 5 minutes; remove chiles and garlic.
Add kale, celery, scallions, cilantro, mint, and basil to dressing and toss to coat (salad should be very heavily dressed).
Serve salad topped with sev and MSG and chili oil, if using.
DO AHEAD: Dressing can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill. Bring to room temperature before using.

name: Kale And Cucumber Salad With Roasted Ginger Dressing

ingredients.prep: ribs and stems removed, leaves torn into bite-size pieces

instructions: Heat broiler. Broil ginger in its skin, turning once, until very dark brown and beginning to scorch in places and a paring knife passes through the center with relative ease, 40–50 minutes (if skin is getting too dark before flesh is tender, turn down the heat or move to the oven). Let cool; slice (leave on the skin).
Pulse ginger, chile, garlic, fish sauce, sugar, oil, and 2 Tbsp. water in a food processor, adding additional water by tablespoonfuls if needed, until a smooth paste forms.
Do Ahead: Dressing can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and chill.
Toss kale and ¼ cup dressing in a large bowl to coat; massage with your fingers until kale is slightly softened.
Toss English and Persian cucumbers, onion, lime juice, and sugar in a medium bowl to combine; season generously with salt. Let sit 10 minutes to allow cucumbers and onion to soften slightly.
Add cucumber mixture to bowl with kale and toss to combine, adding additional dressing if desired. Serve topped with cilantro and fried onions.

name: Kale And Lentil Soup

ingredients.item: -ounce container no-salt or low-salt chicken or vegetable broth

instructions: Combine all ingredients except kale in a large pot. Cover and bring to a boil; stir, then reduce heat to a simmer and cook, partially covered, for 20 minutes. Stir in kale and cook, partially covered, until lentils and carrots are tender and kale wilts, about 10 minutes longer. Using an immersion blender, purée the soup. Refrigerate in an airtight container for up to 3 days, or freeze for up to 2 months.

name: Kale And Mustard Greens With Pepitas And Red Onion

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground pepper

instructions: Whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, and zest in a large bowl and season with salt and pepper. Add kale, mustard greens, onion, and pepitas and toss well to combine.

name: Kale And Pink Grapefruit Salad

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Using a sharp knife, cut peel and white pith from grapefruit; discard. Working over a small bowl, cut between membranes to release segments into bowl. Squeeze juice from membranes into another small bowl; add any accumulated juices from bowl with segments (there should be about 1/4 cup juice total). Whisk oil into juice and season to taste with salt and pepper.

Place kale in a large bowl and drizzle 3 Tbsp. dressing over. Toss to combine and let stand for 10 minutes while kale wilts slightly. Toss once more, then arrange grapefruit segments and avocado slices over kale. Drizzle with remaining dressing and serve.

name: Kale And Sausage Soup

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Melt butter in a stockpot over medium-low heat. Whisk in flour; stir until paste-like and light golden brown, about 3 minutes. Gradually whisk in chicken broth and water; bring to a simmer over medium heat. Add onion, garlic, thyme, bay leaves, and sage; cook until thickened and onion is tender, 10 to 15 minutes.
Meanwhile, heat a large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Add sausage; cook and stir until browned and crumbly, 5 to 7 minutes. Transfer sausage to a paper towel-lined plate to drain.
Add sausage, potatoes, kale, and mushrooms to the pot; simmer until potatoes are tender, about 45 minutes. Stir in half-and-half; season with salt and black pepper.

name: Kale And Smoked Bacon Salad With Zinfandel Vinaigrette

ingredients.item: Zinfandel vinegar or other red wine vinegar

ingredients.prep: center stems removed, leaves torn into large pieces

instructions: Combine vinegar, shallots, and mustard in medium bowl. Gradually whisk in oil. DO AHEAD Can be made 2 hours ahead. Let stand at room temperature.
Cook bacon in large skillet over medium-high heat until crisp; transfer to paper towels. Reserve skillet with drippings.

Fill large bowl with ice water. Bring large pot of water to boil; add 2 tablespoons coarse salt. Add all of kale and cook 2 minutes. Drain; transfer kale to ice water and let cool until cold, about 1 minute. Drain kale. Working in batches, spin drained kale in salad spinner to remove additional water. Place kale in large bowl. Crumble bacon into 1/2-inch pieces and add to kale.
Rewarm drippings in skillet. Whisk 2 tablespoons drippings into vinaigrette (reserve remaining drippings for another use). Season vinaigrette with coarse salt and pepper. Toss salad with vinaigrette.

name: Kale And Walnut Pesto
instructions: Blanch kale in a large pot of boiling salted water, about 1 minute. Drain and rinse with cold water to cool; wring dry in a clean kitchen towel. Transfer to a food processor, add garlic, Parmesan, and walnuts, and pulse until coarsely chopped. With motor running, add oil in a steady stream and process to a coarse purée. Add lemon juice and season with salt and pepper.

name: Kale And White Bean Soup

ingredients.prep: center ribs and stems removed, leaves coarsely chopped

instructions: Tuscan kale, also called black kale, dinosaur kale, Lacinato kale, or cavolo nero, is available at farmers’ markets and some supermarkets.

Heat oil in a large, heavy-bottomed pot over medium heat. Add onion, garlic, and chorizo and cook, stirring occasionally, until onion is soft and chorizo is golden, 6–8 minutes. Add kale and cook , tossing occasionally, until wilted, about 3 minutes. Add beans and broth and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer until flavors meld , 15–20 minutes; season with salt and pepper. Divide soup among bowls, top with parsley, and serve with lemon wedges alongside for squeezing over.

name: Kale Blt Salad
instructions: Process preserved lemon, crème fraîche, mayonnaise, and vinegar in a food processor until smooth; season dressing with salt and pepper. Cover and chill until ready to use.

Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high and cook bacon, turning halfway through, until brown and crisp, 8–10 minutes per side. Transfer to paper towels and let cool slightly. Slice crosswise to yield 12 pieces.
Toss kale and dressing in a large bowl until coated; let sit 5 minutes.
Add tomatoes and gently toss to coat. Divide salad among plates and top each with 3 pieces of bacon.
Do Ahead: Dressing can be made 1 day ahead. Keep chilled.

name: Kale Caesar Salad

ingredients.item: Grated zest and juice of 1 lemon

ingredients.prep: stems removed, leaves cut into ribbons

instructions: Coat a large saute pan with olive oil. Toss in 2 cloves garlic and the red pepper flakes and bring the pan to medium heat. Cook the garlic until it becomes golden and very aromatic, 2 to 3 minutes. Remove the garlic and ditch it - it has fulfilled its garlic destiny. Toss in the bread cubes and cook, stirring frequently, until they are golden, crisp and have absorbed all the oil, like little olive oil sponges. Remove from the heat and reserve.

In the bowl of a food processor, combine the parmigiano, lemon zest and juice, the remaining 1 to 2 cloves garlic, the mustard, anchovies and Worcestershire sauce. Puree until the mixture is smooth, 15 to 20 seconds. With the machine running, add 1/4 to 1/2 cup olive oil through the feed tube. Let the processor continue to run another 10 to 15 seconds. Taste and season with salt if needed.

In a large bowl, toss the kale with the croutons and two-thirds of the dressing. Let the kale sit 3 to 4 minutes to soften. Taste, add the remaining dressing and adjust the seasoning if needed. Top with more parmigiano.

name: Kale Caesar Salad With Lemony Breadcrumbs

ingredients.prep: ribs and stems removed, leaves torn into 1" pieces
finely grated (about  0.5 cup), plus more for serving

instructions: Melt butter in a medium skillet over medium heat. Add panko, ¼ tsp. salt, and a few grinds of pepper. Cook panko, stirring often but being careful not to crush, until golden brown, 5–8 minutes. Carefully stir in half of the lemon zest and set aside.
Place kale in a large bowl and drizzle 2 Tbsp. oil over. Massage kale with your hands until dark green and very soft, about 3 minutes.

Using the flat side of a chef’s knife, smash anchovy fillets on a cutting board to a coarse paste; transfer paste to a medium bowl. Whisk in lemon juice, mayonnaise, mustard, Worcestershire sauce, garlic, ½ oz. Parmesan, and remaining ¼ tsp. salt. Gradually stream in remaining ¼ cup oil, whisking constantly until dressing is smooth and creamy.

Add half of dressing to bowl with kale and toss to evenly coat. Taste and add more dressing by the tablespoonful until salad is well-dressed. Taste salad and season with more salt and pepper if needed.

Mound salad onto a platter or divide among plates. Drizzle any remaining dressing over and top with more Parmesan, reserved panko, and remaining lemon zest.
Do ahead: Panko topping can be made 3 days ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

name: Kale Chips
instructions: 1. Preheat the oven to 177°C. Spray two baking trays with cooking spray. Remove the center rib and stems from each kale leaf and discard. Tear or cut the leaves into bite-size pieces, about 2 to 3 inches wide. Wash the kale and dry it very well.

2. Place the kale in a large bowl. Drizzle with the oil and sprinkle with the garlic powder and salt, and massage the oil and seasonings into the kale with your hands to distribute evenly. Place the kale in a single layer on the baking sheets, and bake until crisp and the edges are slightly browned, 12 to 15 minutes.

name: Kale Chips With Rye Breadcrumbs
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Brush both sides of kale leaves with oil and season with salt. Place on 2 baking sheets, in a single layer. Bake until crisp but not brown, 8–10 minutes.

Meanwhile, pulse bread in a food processor until coarse crumbs form. Melt butter in a medium skillet over medium heat. Add breadcrumbs and cook, stirring often, until golden brown, about 5 minutes. Transfer to a plate.
Whisk cream cheese with 1 Tbsp. water in a medium bowl until smooth; season with salt and pepper. Dot kale chips with cream cheese mixture and sprinkle with toasted breadcrumbs.
DO AHEAD: Breadcrumbs and cream cheese mixture can be made 1 day ahead. Store breadcrumbs airtight at room temperature. Cover and chill cream cheese mixture.

name: Kale Dressing

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Preheat oven to 400°. Using your hands, toss bread in a large bowl while drizzling with 1/2 cup oil, squeezing bread to help it absorb oil. Spread out on 2 rimmed baking sheets, dividing equally; set aside.

Toast bread, stirring often and rotating baking sheets halfway through, until croutons are golden brown and crisp on the outside but still a little soft inside, about 20 minutes. Let cool; return to large bowl.

Meanwhile, toast fennel seeds in a small skillet over medium heat, shaking pan often, until seeds are fragrant and light gold, 2-3 minutes. Let cool. Using a spice mill or a mortar and pestle, coarsely grind fennel seeds; set aside. Alternatively, crush seeds in a resealable freezer bag with bottom of a heavy skillet.

Heat a large skillet over medium heat for 2 minutes. Add remaining 1/4 cup oil and butter. When butter is melted, add rosemary sprigs and chile; let sizzle in pan for 1 minute, then add crushed fennel seeds, fennel, onions, thyme, and garlic. Season with salt and pepper and sauté until vegetables are tender and lightly caramelized, 6-8 minutes. Discard rosemary sprigs and chile. Add vegetable mixture and Slow-Cooked Tuscan Kale to croutons.

Boil wine in same skillet over medium-high heat until reduced by 3/4, 1-2 minutes. Add broth; bring to a boil. Add to crouton mixture; toss well. Season with salt and pepper. Add eggs; stir to distribute. Transfer to a 13x9x2-inch baking dish. Cover with foil.

Bake dressing until heated through, about 30 minutes (a knife inserted into the center should be hot to the touch). Remove foil and bake until bread is golden and crisped on top, 25-30 minutes longer.

name: Kale Minestrone Soup With Pistou

ingredients.prep: white and pale-green parts only, thinly sliced
cooking liquid reserved if desired, or two 15-ounce cans, rinsed
ribs and stems removed, leaves torn into 1" pieces

instructions: Tie oregano, rosemary, and bay leaves together with kitchen twine.

Heat oil in a large heavy pot over medium. Add pancetta, if using, and cook, stirring often, until browned around the edges, about 5 minutes. Add onion, leek, carrots, celery, garlic, and red pepper flakes; season with salt. Cook, stirring often, until onion is translucent and carrots are tender, 10–12 minutes. Add tomato paste and cook, stirring to coat, until slightly darkened, about 3 minutes.

Add tomatoes, crushing with your hands as you go, then herb bundle, Parmesan rind, if using, and 6 cups water or reserved bean cooking liquid, or a combination. Season with salt and pepper and bring to a boil. Add potatoes, reduce heat, and simmer until potatoes are tender and flavors have melded, 20–25 minutes. Add kale and beans; cook until kale is tender, about 5 minutes. Discard Parmesan rind and herb bundle.
Do ahead: Soup can be made 2 days ahead (or 2 months if frozen). Let cool; transfer to airtight containers and chill.
Pulse garlic and basil in a food processor until finely chopped. Transfer to a small bowl and stir in oil, Parmesan, and lemon zest; season with salt. Serve soup topped with pistou.

name: Kale Minestrone With Pistou

ingredients.prep: white and pale-green parts only, thinly sliced
cooking liquid reserved if desired, or two 15-oz. cans, rinsed
ribs and stems removed, leaves torn into 1” pieces

instructions: Tie oregano, rosemary, and bay leaves together with kitchen twine.

Heat oil in a large heavy pot over medium. Add pancetta, if using, and cook, stirring often, until browned around the edges, about 5 minutes. Add onion, leek, carrots, celery, garlic, and red pepper flakes; season with salt. Cook, stirring often, until onion is translucent and carrots are tender, 10–12 minutes. Add tomato paste and cook, stirring to coat, until slightly darkened, about 3 minutes.

Add tomatoes, crushing with your hands as you go, then herb bundle, Parmesan rind, if using, and 6 cups water or reserved bean cooking liquid, or a combination. Season with salt and pepper and bring to a boil. Add potatoes, reduce heat, and simmer until potatoes are tender and flavors have melded, 20–25 minutes. Add kale and beans; cook until kale is tender, about 5 minutes. Discard Parmesan rind and herb bundle.
Do Ahead: Soup can be made 2 days ahead (or 2 months if frozen). Let cool; transfer to airtight containers and chill.
Pulse garlic and basil in a food processor until finely chopped. Transfer to a small bowl and stir in oil, Parmesan, and lemon zest; season with salt. Serve soup topped with pistou.

name: Kale Pasta Salad
instructions: Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Add penne and cook, stirring occasionally, until tender yet firm to the bite, about 11 minutes. Drain well.

Combine pasta, carrots, kale, cherry tomatoes, cucumber, bell pepper, olives, and shallot in a bowl. Combine Greek dressing and mayonnaise in a separate bowl; drizzle over salad and mix until well combined.

name: Kale Pesto With Pasta

ingredients.item: . farro pasta or whole wheat pasta

ingredients.prep: finely grated, plus more for serving

instructions: Cook kale leaves in a large pot of boiling salted water until bright green and wilted, about 30 seconds. Transfer to a rimmed baking sheet with tongs; keep water boiling. Let kale cool slightly; wring out excess water with your hands.
Cook pasta in pot of boiling water, stirring occasionally, until al dente.

Blend nuts, oil, garlic, and ⅓ cup water in a blender or food processor until very smooth. Add kale and 1 oz. Parmesan. Purée, adding water 1 Tbsp. at a time as needed, until smooth. Transfer pesto to a large bowl.

Using tongs, transfer pasta to bowl with pesto; add butter and ⅓ cup pasta cooking liquid. Toss, adding more pasta cooking liquid by the tablespoonful if needed, until sauce coats pasta. Divide among bowls; top with more Parmesan and a few grinds of pepper.

name: Kale Salad

ingredients.prep: ribs discarded and leaves cut into thin strips

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Place kale in a large serving bowl; add 1 teaspoon olive oil and 2 pinches salt. Gently massage oil and salt into kale. Set aside to allow kale to soften, about 10 minutes.

To make the dressing: Combine 1/4 cup olive oil, lemon juice, Dijon mustard, maple syrup, cumin, garlic powder, cayenne pepper, salt, and pepper for vinaigrette in a plastic or glass container with a lid. Cover the container and vigorously shake until dressing is light yellow and evenly combined.
Layer carrots, roasted corn, tortilla chips, almonds, and smoked cheese on top of kale.
Drizzle vinaigrette over salad; mix with tongs until evenly distributed. Gently stir chopped eggs into salad.

name: Kale Salad With Brussels Sprouts, Apples, And Hazelnuts

ingredients.prep: such as Pink Lady or Honeycrisp, cored, cut into matchsticks

instructions: Heat oven to 177°C. Place hazelnuts on a rimmed baking sheet and toast 8-10 minutes, tossing once or twice, until fragrant and skins have blistered. Bundle nuts in a kitchen towel and rub vigorously to remove skins. Spread out and let cool, then coarsely chop. Set aside.
Meanwhile, whisk lemon juice, mustard, shallot, garlic, 1 tsp. salt, and ½ tsp. pepper in a medium bowl, then whisk in oil in a slow, steady stream. Set aside.

Mix together kale and brussels sprouts in a large mixing bowl. Add about ¾ of the dressing, and use your hands to massage dressing into greens. Taste and add more dressing as needed (you may not need all of it). Reserve any leftover dressing for another use.
Add cheese, apple, and half of the radishes; toss together to combine, and season with salt and pepper to taste. Transfer to a serving bowl, and top with nuts and remaining radishes.

Dressing can be prepared 3 days ahead; cover and chill. Nuts can be toasted and chopped 1 day ahead; cover and keep at room temperature. Kale and brussels sprouts can be sliced 1 day ahead; place in an airtight container and chill. Salad can be tossed together 30 minutes ahead; keep at room temperature.

name: Kale Salad With Butternut Squash And Almonds

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

ingredients.prep: stems removed, cut into 1/2-inch wide ribbons (about 5 cups)

instructions: Preheat oven to 425°. Line a baking sheet with foil. Whisk 5 Tbsp. oil, vinegar, shallot, and Dijon mustard in a small bowl. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Set aside. Combine squash and 2 Tbsp. oil in a medium bowl and toss to combine; season with salt and pepper. Transfer squash to prepared baking sheet and roast, turning occasionally, until squash is tender and lightly golden, about 20 minutes. Let cool slightly.

Meanwhile, heat remaining 1 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet over high heat. Add kale and cook, tossing frequently, until bright green and slightly wilted, 1–2 minutes. Remove from heat; add 3–4 Tbsp. dressing and toss to coat. Transfer kale to a baking sheet and cool slightly, about 5 minutes.
Add reserved squash and almonds to kale; toss well and season with pepper. Divide among bowls; drizzle with more dressing, if desired. Using a vegetable peeler, shave Parmesan over.

name: Kale Salad With Cranberries
instructions: Combine water and cranberries in a small saucepan and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer until cranberries are soft and liquid is syrupy, 5 to 10 minutes. Stir in honey, remove from the heat, and allow to cool.
Put kale and red onion in an 8-quart pot or a very large bowl.

Whisk olive oil, balsamic vinegar, garlic, salt, and pepper together in a small bowl; pour over the kale and stir well. Add feta cheese, walnuts, and moist cranberries with their syrup; stir until well combined. Cover and place in the refrigerator to marinate, stirring occasionally, until kale has wilted and shrunken in size, 3 to 8 hours.
To serve, transfer to a smaller serving bowl.

name: Kale Salad With Dates, Parmesan And Almonds

ingredients.prep: stems removed, leaves shredded or finely chopped

instructions: In a bowl, whisk juice, shallot, honey, salt and pepper flakes. Add kale; toss well. Let sit 20 minutes. Mix in oil. Refrigerate for up to 1 day, or serve immediately. In a dry pan, toast almonds over medium heat, tossing constantly, until color deepens, 1 to 2 minutes. Add almonds, dates and Parmesan to kale; serve.

name: Kale Salad With Pecan Vinaigrette

ingredients.prep: ribs and stems removed, leaves thinly sliced

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Toast pecans on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing halfway through, until slightly darkened and fragrant, 8–10 minutes. Let cool.
Transfer a handful of pecans to a cutting board and coarsely chop; set aside for serving.
Pulse garlic, oil, capers, honey, and remaining pecans in a food processor until nuts are in small pieces. Transfer to a large bowl and stir in vinegar; season dressing with salt and pepper.
Add kale and radishes to bowl with dressing; toss to coat. Taste salad and season with more salt and pepper. Top with reserved chopped pecans.

name: Kale Salad With Persimmons, Feta, And Crisp Prosciutto

ingredients.prep: creamy feta cheese, such as Bulgarian

instructions: Heat oven to 177°C. Lay out prosciutto slices on a rimmed baking sheet. Bake until almost crisp, 16–18 minutes. Transfer to wire rack and let cool completely on baking sheet (prosciutto will continue to crisp as it cools). Crumble and set aside.
Meanwhile, spread pecans on a rimmed baking sheet and toast in oven, tossing once or twice, until fragrant, 8–10 minutes. Let cool, then coarsely chop. Set aside.
Whisk lime juice, mustard, shallot, honey, garlic, 1 tsp. salt, and 1/4 tsp. pepper in a medium bowl, then whisk in oil in a slow, steady stream. Set aside.

In a large mixing bowl, combine kale with about 3/4 of the dressing and use your hands to massage dressing into kale. Add more dressing as needed (you may not need all of it). Reserve any leftover dressing for another use.

Add half of the persimmons, feta, mint, and prosciutto, toss together to combine, and season with salt and pepper to taste. Transfer to a serving bowl, and top with pecans and remaining persimmons, feta, mint, and prosciutto.

Dressing can be prepared 3 days ahead; cover and chill. Nuts can be toasted and chopped 1 day ahead; cover and keep at room temperature. Kale can be sliced 1 day ahead; place in an airtight container and chill. Salad can be tossed together 30 minutes ahead; keep at room temperature.

name: Kale Salad With Roasted Tempeh And Mushrooms

ingredients.prep: crimini, button, oyster, and/or beech), torn or cut into 1 0.5" pieces
ribs and stems removed, leaves coarsely chopped

ingredients.item: Basil leaves and/or cilantro leaves with tender stems

instructions: Preheat oven to 425°. Whisk 3 Tbsp. white miso and 2 Tbsp. soy sauce in a large bowl. Add ⅓ cup extra-virgin olive oil and whisk until emulsified. Add one 8-oz. block tempeh, torn into 1½" pieces, and 8 oz. mixed mushrooms (shiitake, crimini, button, oyster, and/or beech), torn or cut into 1½" pieces, and toss to coat. Transfer to a rimmed baking sheet and spread out in an even layer; reserve bowl. Roast tempeh and mushrooms until deep golden brown, 20–25 minutes.

Meanwhile, whisk 2 garlic cloves, finely grated, 2 Tbsp. fresh lime juice, 2 Tbsp. pure maple syrup, remaining 3 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil, 1 Tbsp. white miso, and 1 Tbsp. soy sauce in reserved bowl until emulsified. Add 2 large bunches Tuscan kale, ribs and stems removed, leaves coarsely chopped, and toss to coat. Massage leaves with your hands until softened, about 4 minutes.
Transfer tempeh and mushrooms to bowl. Add ½ medium Persian cucumber, thinly sliced on a diagonal, and ½ cup basil leaves and/or cilantro leaves with tender stems and toss to combine.

name: Kale Salad With Tomato And Fresh Cheese
original_name: Salada de couve com tomate e queijo fresco
instructions: Corte a couve coração em pedaços e coza-os em água a ferver. Retire, escorra e deixe arrefecer em água fria.
Coloque depois a couve numa saladeira e adicione os tomates-cereja cortados ao meio e as folhas de hortelã. Corte o queijo em cubos e espalhe por cima.
Misture a mostarda com o vinagre, tempere com o alho em pó, sal e pimenta e envolva tudo muito bem. Regue a salada com este molho, polvilhe com sementes e sirva.

name: Kale Soup
instructions: 1. İlk olarak karalahanayı ince ince doğrayın ve üzerine tuz serpip biraz ovun.
2. Bu esnada tereyağı ile zeytinyağını tencerede ısıtın.
3.  Üzerine önceden doğranmış yemeklik soğanları ekleyip soteleyin.
4. Soğan yumuşayınca karalahanayı ilave edin.
5.  Karışımın içerisine 4 su bardağı su ekleyip kaynamaya bırakın.
6. Karalahanalar yumuşayınca kırmızıbiber, barbunya ve mısırı ekleyin.
7.  Yaklaşık 7-8 dakika kaynattıktan sonra tuz ve karabiber ile tatlandırın.
8.  Şimdiden afiyet olsun.

name: Kale With Pomegranate Dressing And Ricotta Salata

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
Red russian or purple kale or 2 bunches tuscan kale
ingredients.prep: ribs and stems removed, leaves torn into 2” pieces

instructions: Combine shallot, vinegar, and pomegranate molasses in a large bowl; season dressing with salt and pepper and let sit 5 minutes.
Add kale to dressing, season with salt and pepper, and massage dressing into leaves. Add pomegranate seeds and oil and toss to combine. Serve topped with ricotta salata.
DO AHEAD: Dressing can be made 4 hours ahead; cover and chill.

name: Kale With Sauce And Meat
instructions: 1. Karalahana yapraklarını kaynar suda 5 dakika haşlayıp süzün.
2.  İç malzeme için pirinci yıkayıp süzün.
3.  Soğanı soyup kıyın.
4.  Maydanozu temizleyip kıyın.
5.  Kıymayı derin bir kaba alın.
6.  Kıyılmış soğan, maydanoz, biber salçası, pirinç, tuz ve karabiberi ilave edip yoğurun.
7. Karalahana yapraklarını tezgahın üzerine alın.
8.  Sap kısımlarını kesip her bir lahana yaprağının ortasına bir kaşık kadar iç malzemeden paylaştırın.
9.  Muska şeklinde sarın.
10.  Aralık kalmayacak şekilde tencereye dizin.
11.  Üzerlerine bir bardak sıcak su ilave edin.
12.  Sarmaların üzerini porselen bir tabakla kapatın.
13.  Tencerenin kapağı kapalı olarak kısık ateşte yarım saat pişirin.
14. Sos için, zeytinyağını sos tenceresinde ısıtıp küp şeklinde kesilmiş domatesi ve kırmızı biberi kavurun.
15.  Ocaktan alıp tuz, nar ekşisi ve baharatı ekleyip tatlandırın.
16.  Sarmaları servis tabağına alın.
17.  Dilerseniz domatesli sosla sıcak servis yapın.
18. Bağışıklık sistemini güçlendirecek Trabzon usulü karalahana çorbası tarifini de deneyin.

name: Kale With The Greenest Tahini Sauce

ingredients.item: Pinch of aleppo pepper or hot paprika

ingredients.prep: stems removed, torn into bite-size pieces

instructions: Ingredient Info: Aleppo pepper, a slightly sweet Syrian pepper with a moderate heat level, is available at some specialty foods stores and wholespice.com.

Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add garlic and Aleppo pepper and cook until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Add kale and 1 Tbsp. water. Cook, tossing, until kale is wilted and tender, about 3 minutes. Toss with tahini sauce, season with salt, and serve with lemon wedges.

name: Kale Wrap
instructions: 1. Karalahanaları yıkayıp kaynayan tuzlu suya atın ve yumuşayıncaya kadar haşlayın.
2.  Süzerek soğumaya bırakın.
3. Soğanı yemeklik doğrayıp kıymaya karıştırın.
4.  Pirinç, zeytinyağı, tuz, salça, maydanoz ve baharatları ekleyip karıştırın.
5. Harçtan yaprakların içine doldurup sarın.
6.  Tencerenin zeminine karalahana yaprakları serip, dolmaları tencereye dizin.
7.  En üste zeytinyağı gezdirip üzerine uygun büyüklükte bir tabak kapatın ve dolmaların hizasına gelecek kadar sıcak su ekleyin.
8.  Kaynamaya başlayınca ocağın altını kısın.
9.  Yumuşayıncaya kadar pişirin.
10. Tereyağını eritip salçayı 3 dakika kavurun.
11.  Dolmaları tabağa alın.
12.  Üzerine sarımsaklı yoğurt ve salçalı sos gezdirdikten sonra sıcak servis yapın.
13.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Kale Wrap With Ribs And Sumac

ingredients.item: 1’er çay kaşığı karabiber, kimyon, kuru nane, kuru reyhan
1 yemek kaşığı sumak (1 çay bardağı sıcak suda bekletin)

instructions: 1. Lahana yapraklarını yıkayın ve kaynar suyun içine daldırıp 3-4 dakika haşladıktan sonra suyunu süzün.
2.  İç malzemesi için kıymayı derin bir kaba alın.
3.  Yıkayıp süzdüğünüz pirinci, rendelenmiş soğanı, tuzu, salçaları ve baharatı ekleyip iyice yoğurun.
4.  Lahana yapraklarını tezgahın üzerine alın, damarlı kısımları keserek avuç içi büyüklüğü kadar parçalar elde edin.
5.  Her parçanın kenarına elinizle bir parmak uzunluğunda sıktığınız harçtan yerleştirip sarın.
6.  Bu arada kaburgalar için sarmayı yapacağınız tencereyi iyice ısıtın.
7.  Kaburgaları üçer dakika kadar her iki tarafını kızartıp ocaktan alın.
8.  Sarmaları kaburgaların üzerine bitişik bir şekilde dizin.
9.  Sosu için biber salçasını, sıcak suda beklettiğiniz sumağı, sarmaların üzerini örtecek şekilde sıcak suyu ve sıvı yağı karıştırın.
10.  Hazırladığınız sosu sarmaların üzerine dökün ve düz bir tabakla kapatıp orta ateşte 5 dakika pişirin.
11.  Daha sonra ateşi iyice kısarak 30 dakika daha pişirin.
12. Kaburgalı ve sumaklı karalahana sarmasını, börülce salatası ile birlikte servis edebilirsiniz.
13.  Afiyet olsun.
14. Kaburgalı ve Sumaklı Karalahana Sarmasının Püf Noktaları Nelerdir?Tarife başlarken karalahanaları kaya tuzu ile ovalayın ve sudan geçirin.
15. Kuzu etini sos ile marine edin ve dinlenmeye bırakın.
16.  Oda sıcaklığında bekledikçe etin lezzeti artacaktır.
17. Lahanaların damarlı kısımlarını kesmek yerine, bıçağın tersi ile ezerek düz bir hale getirebilirsiniz.
18. Lahanaları haşlarken suyun içerisine tuz ve limon suyu dökün.
19.  Böylece daha çabuk yumuşayacaktır.
20. Sosu hazırlarken biber salçasına, rendelenmiş domates suyu da ekleyebilirsiniz.
21. 1 Porsiyon Kaburgalı ve Sumaklı Karalahana Sarması Kaç Kaloridir?Kuzu etiyle hazırlanan kaburgalı ve sumaklı karalahana sarmasının bir porsiyonu, yaklaşık 230 kaloridir.
22.  Kas gelişimi destekleyen ve kemik hastalıklarına iyi gelen bu tarife, diyet listelerinde yer verebilirsiniz.
23.  Alternatif versiyonu olan pirzolalı karalahana sarmasını da notlarınız arasına ekleyin.
24. Özel günlerde veya kalabalık sofralarda sunabileceğiniz hafif et yemekleri mi arıyorsunuz? Mis gibi kokusuyla herkesi kendine hayran bırakacak nefis kuzu incik tarifine göz atabilirsiniz.

name: Kale, Apple, Walnut And Sumac Onion Tabbouleh
instructions: Combine red onion, red wine vinegar, ground sumac, and kosher salt in a small bowl.
Combine all the ingredients, including the sumac onions, in a large bowl. Toss to combine and serve.

name: Kale, Quinoa, And Avocado Salad With Lemon Dijon Vinaigrette
instructions: Bring 1 1/3 cups water and quinoa to a boil in a saucepan. Reduce heat to medium-low, cover, and simmer until quinoa tender and water absorbed, 15 to 20 minutes. Set aside to cool.

Place a steamer basket into a saucepan with 1 inch water; bring water to a boil. Add kale, cover, and steam until hot, about 45 seconds; transfer to a large plate. Top kale with quinoa, avocado, cucumber, bell pepper, red onion, and feta cheese.
Whisk olive oil, lemon juice, Dijon mustard, sea salt, and black pepper together in a bowl until emulsified; pour over salad.

name: Kaleb's Spring Spinach Salad
instructions: Whisk together oil, ketchup, cider vinegar, honey, Worcestershire, pepper, and salt for dressing in a large measuring cup until well combined.

Add spinach to a large serving bowl. Add 1/2 of the bacon, 1/2 of the eggs, 1/2 of the radishes, and 1/2 of the green onion. Pour in about 1/4 cup dressing and toss to combine. Top with remaining bacon, eggs, radishes, and green onion.
Serve with remaining 3/4 cup dressing for drizzling.

name: Kalimati

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: preferably freshly ground (from about 20 green cardamom pods)

instructions: Whisk one ¼-oz. packet instant yeast (about 2¼ tsp.), ¼ cup plain whole-milk yogurt, 3 Tbsp. sugar, 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, ½ tsp. baking powder, and 1 cup water in a bowl to combine. Using a rubber spatula, mix in 2 cups (250 g) all-purpose flour until a very sticky, almost batter-like dough forms. Cover bowl and let dough sit in a warm, draft-free spot until doubled in size, about 1 hour.

While the dough is rising, bring ¾ cup sugar, 1 tsp. ground cardamom, ¼ tsp. kosher salt, and ½ cup water to a boil in small saucepan over medium-high heat, stirring to dissolve sugar. Cook until syrup is slightly thickened, about 3 minutes. Remove from heat and set aside.
Pour vegetable oil into a large heavy saucepan to come 3" up sides and fit with thermometer. Heat over medium until thermometer registers 325°.

Release dough from sides of bowl with rubber spatula and gently fold to gather. Using a #100 cookie scoop or 2 small spoons and working in batches of 8 or so, carefully drop balls of dough into oil and fry until deep golden brown, about 2 minutes per side. Transfer kalimati to paper towels and let cool slightly.
Place kalimati in a medium bowl and pour reserved syrup over; toss to coat. Transfer to a platter and sprinkle with flaky sea salt before serving, if desired.

name: Kalkan Pan And Parsley Salad
instructions: 1. Unları bir kapta harmanlayın.
2.  Balıkları tuza bulayın ve tuzlu haliyle 15 dakika boyunca bekletin.
3.  Balıkları önce unlu karışıma bulayın, sonra kızgın yağda her iki tarafını 4’er dakika arayla kızartın.
4.  Kağıt havlu üzerine alıp fazla yağının süzülmesini sağlayın.
5. Maydanoz salatası için sumağı, zeytinyağını, limon suyunu ve sirkeyi karıştırıp salatanın sosunu hazırlayın.
6.  Yeşillikleri de bir kapta harmanlayın.
7.  Sosu yeşilliklere ilave edip iyice karıştırın.
8.  Kalkan tava ile birlikte servis edin.

name: Kalogeros Naxos

ingredients.item: 250 grγραβιέρα ή άλλο κίτρινο τυρί που λιώνει σε χοντρές φέτες
250 grγραβιέρα ή άλλο κίτρινο τυρί που λιώνει σε χοντρές φέτες

instructions: Κόβουμε το κρέας σε 4 φέτες και το στεγνώνουνε  σε απορροφητικό χαρτί.
Ζεσταίνουμε μικρή κατσαρόλα σε μέτρια προς δυνατή φωτιά και προσθέτουμε το ελαιόλαδο.
Ροδίζουμε το κρέας για 4-5’ να κάνει κρούστα κι αναποδογυρίζουμε για άλλα 2-3 λεπτά.
Προσθέτουμε το ψιλοκομμένο κρεμμύδι και σοτάρουμε για 3’ να γίνει διάφανο.
Βάζουμε το ψιλοκομμένο σκόρδο και τον πελτέ.
Σοτάρουμε για 1’ τρίβοντας τον πελτέ στην κατσαρόλα να βγάλει τα αρώματα του.
Σβήνουμε με το κρασί κι αφήνουμε να εξατμιστεί το αλκοόλ.
Προσθέτουμε τις ψιλοκομμένες ντομάτες και αρωματίζουμε με δαφνόφυλλο και μπαχάρι.
Συμπληρώνουμε ελάχιστο ζεστό νερό και σκεπάζουμε το κρέας.
Χαμηλώνουμε την εστία και σιγοβράζουμε για περίπου 1 ώρα και 15’ μέχρι να μαλακώσει  και να μελώσει δέσει η σάλτσα του.
Μέχρι να βράσει, το κρέας ετοιμάζουμε τις μελιτζάνες. Τις κόβουμε στη μέση.
Με κοφτερό μυτερό μαχαίρι χαράζουμε διαγώνια την σάρκα της  χωρίς να κόψουμε καθόλου την φλούδα.
Χαράζουμε μόνο στο εσωτερικό της.
Τις ραντίζουμε με λίγο ελαιόλαδο και πασπαλίζουμε με λίγο αλάτι μέσα στην χαραγμένη σάρκα.
Τις βάζουμε σε μικρό ταψί στρωμένο με αντικολλητικό χαρτί.
Πασπαλίζουμε με λίγο θρούμπι ή ρίγανη.
Ψήνουμε σε καλά προθερμασμένο φούρνο στους 200 ºC στον αέρα στην μεσαία σχάρα μέχρι να ψηθεί και μαλακώσει για περίπου 30’
Αφού ψηθούν, με ένα κουτάλι πιέζουμε την μαλακή σάρκα της, ώστε να δημιουργήσουμε θήκη στην μέση.
Βάζουμε το κρέας μέσα στη μελιτζάνα με λίγη δεμένη από την σάλτσα του.
Από πάνω βάζουμε 1 κ.σ. ξινομυζήθρα
Ακουμπάμε λεπτή φέτα ντομάτας και καλύπτουμε με χοντρή φέτα γραβιέρα η άλλο κίτρινο τυρί που λιώνει.
Γαρνίρουμε κάθε καλόγερο με μια φέτα πιπεριάς.
Ψήνουμε σε καλά προθερμασμένο φούρνο στους 200 ºC στη μεσαία σχάρα για 10’ να λιώσουν τα τυριά και γύρω – γύρω, να καλύψει η λιωμένη γραβιέρα την μελιτζάνα.
Σερβίρουμε τον καλόγερο ζεστό με πατάτες Νάξου τηγανητές.

name: Kalpak Rice

ingredients.item: 3 su bardağı sıcak et suyu veya su

instructions: 1. Pirinçleri ayıklayıp yıkayın.
2.  Tuzlu suda 30 dakika bekletin.
3.  Tencereye tereyağını ekleyip eritin.
4.  Üzerine suyunu süzdüğünüz pirinç ve defne yaprağını ilave edip soteleyin.
5.  3 su bardağı sıcak su ekleyip kaynatın.
6.  Kaynamaya başlayınca kapağını kapatıp kısık ateşte pişirin.
7.  Ayrı bir tencereye 1 yemek kaşığı ayçiçek yağını ekleyip, yemeklik doğradığınız soğanı ilave edin.
8.  Soğan yumuşayınca kıymayı ilave edin.
9.  Kıymayı kavurduktan sonra tuz, karabiber ve ince kıyılmış maydanozu ekleyip karıştırın ve ocaktan alın.
10.  Ayrı bir tavada 1 yemek kaşığı ayçiçek yağını ısıtın.
11.  Rendelediğiniz havuçları ekleyip soteleyin.
12.  Yumuşayınca havuçları tavadan alın.
13.  Aynı tavaya 1 yemek kaşığı ayçiçek yağını ekleyip mantarı ilave edin.
14.  2 dakika soteledikten sonra tuz ve karabiberi ekleyip ocaktan alın.
15.  Derin bir kaseye kıymayı ekleyin.
16.  Üzerine sırayla mantar ve havucu ekleyip yayın.
17.  Pirinç pilavını ekleyip kaşıkla bastırın.
18.  Servis tabağına ters çevirip servis yapın.

name: Kalács (hungarian Cinnamon Swirl Bread)
instructions: Grease a large bowl and set aside. Grease 2 glass loaf pans and set aside.

Place flour, white sugar, salt, and yeast in the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the dough hook attachment. Whisk together warm milk, egg, 1/4 cup melted butter, and vanilla in a medium bowl until well combined; pour into flour mixture. Mix on low until flour is moistened and a dough forms, then increase speed to medium and continue kneading until smooth and elastic, 4 to 5 minutes.
Place dough into the prepared bowl; cover and let rise in a warm place until doubled in bulk, about 1 hour 30 minutes.

Punch down dough, turn out onto a floured work surface, and divide into 2 equal pieces. Roll each piece into a 1/3-inch-thick rectangle. Brush each square with melted butter. Mix together brown sugar and cinnamon in a small bowl until well combined and sprinkle evenly over buttered rectangles.
Roll each rectangle firmly into a log, pinch the ends closed, and tuck underneath. Place into the prepared loaf pans. Cover and let rise in a warm place until doubled in bulk, about 45 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Brush the tops of loaves with melted butter.
Bake in the preheated oven until loaves are golden brown and sound hollow when tapped, about 30 minutes.

name: Kamikaze
instructions: Combine vodka, lime juice, and triple sec in a cocktail shaker. Fill shaker with ice, cover, and shake vigorously until outside of shaker is very cold, about 20 seconds.
Strain cocktail through a Hawthorne strainer or a slotted spoon into two 2-oz. shot glasses.

name: Kamikaze Shots (vodka, Orange Liqueur, And Lime Juice) Cocktail
instructions: Combine vodka, lime juice, and triple sec in a cocktail shaker. Fill shaker with ice, cover, and shake vigorously until outside of shaker is very cold, about 20 seconds.
Strain cocktail through a Hawthorne strainer or a slotted spoon into two 2-oz. shot glasses.

name: Kamikaze Shots For A Crowd
instructions: Pour the vodka, lime juice, and triple sec into a cocktail shaker over ice.
Cover, and shake until the outside of the shaker has frosted.
Strain into chilled shot glasses to serve.

name: Kamo Gyoza Recipe

ingredients.item: (i̇sterseniz hazır gyoza veya wonton hamuru da kullanabilirsiniz.)
250 gr ördek eti (kıyma halinde, göğüs veya but kısmı)
ördek bulamazsanız tavuk but eti (yağlı olduğu için ördeğe yakın doku sağlar)
Geleneksel hamur yerine hazır gyoza hamuru veya wonton yufkası kullanabilirsiniz.
Bulamazsanız ince açılmış mantı veya börek yufkası da acil durumda iş görür (ama biraz farklı bir doku elde edersiniz).

instructions: 1. Un, tuz ve suyu yoğurarak orta sertlikte bir hamur elde edin.
2. Streç filmle sarıp en az 30 dakika dinlendirin.
3. Ördek etini ince kıyılmış lahana, taze soğan, sarımsak, zencefil, soya sosu, susam yağı, pirinç sirkesi ve karabiberle karıştırın.
4. Hamuru merdane ile incecik açın ve bardak ağzı yardımıyla yuvarlak parçalar kesin.
5. Yuvarlak hamurların ortasına bir tatlı kaşığı iç harç koyun.
6. Yarım ay şeklinde kapatın, kenarlarını parmak uçlarıyla bastırarak kıvırın.
7. Tavada yağı ısıtın, gyozaları dizin ve altı hafif kızarana kadar pişirin.
8. Ardından 100 ml su ekleyip kapağını kapatın, buharda 5 dakika pişirin.
9. Suyunu çektikten sonra kapağı açın ve altını biraz daha kızartın.
10. Hazırladığınız sosla birlikte sıcak sıcak servis edin.
11.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Kandaifi

ingredients.item: 300 grαιγοπρόβειο βούτυρο λιωμένο (βούτυρο που βρίσκεται σε βάζα στο σούπερ μάρκετ)
Λίγαψιλοκομμένα καρύδια η φιστίκια αιγίνης για το γαρνίρισμα
300 grαιγοπρόβειο βούτυρο λιωμένο (βούτυρο που βρίσκεται σε βάζα στο σούπερ μάρκετ)
